Follow-up to #23593. That PR dropped the nixl Python stub package because its wheel METADATA carries an unconditional Requires-Dist: nixl-cu12>=1.0.1 — installing plain nixl would pull cu12 binaries onto cu13 images. The cleanup went one step too far: sglang code still imports from nixl._

vllm.title: [Model] Fix Gemma4 MoE activation mismatch
vllm.author: lucianommartins
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Gemma4's Gemma4MoE passes activation="gelu" (exact GELU via torch.ops._C.gelu_and_mul) to FusedMoE, but the published model config (hidden_activation="gelu_pytorch_tanh") and the HuggingFace reference implementation both use the tanh-approximated variant. The dense Gemma4MLP in the same file

vllm.title: [Model] Use AutoWeightsLoader for CohereMoe
vllm.author: Crystora
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Part of #15697.
This PR refactors CohereMoeForCausalLM to use AutoWeightsLoader. Mirrors the pattern used by commandr.py (#19399), mixtral.py (#16325), and the recently merged #41492 for Step3TextForCausalLM.
The CohereMoe weight-loading logic is moved from CohereMoeForCausalLM to the reusab
